common_footer_mission_1: Cholinga cha bitcoin.rocks ndi kufulumizitsa kugwiritsiridwa ntchito kwa bitcoin kudzera mu maphunziro.
common_footer_mission_2: Phunzirani momwe mungathandizire ntchito iyi ya gwero lotseguka.
common_cta_section_title_2: Pezani Chikwama chanu choyamba cha Bitcoin
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_1: Bitcoin ndi zinthu ziwiri: ndalama zadigitala ndi netiweki ya malipiro. Mutha kutumiza Bitcoin (ndalama zadigitala) mwachindunji kwa anthu ena pogwiritsa ntchito netiweki ya Bitcoin (netiweki ya malipiro).
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_2: Bitcoin ndi njira yatsopano kwambiri yosungira ndi kuchita malonda a chuma. Mosiyana ndi maukonde achikhalidwe a ndalama, netiweki ya Bitcoin imatha kugwira ntchito popanda olamulira alikulu kapena oyang'anira odalirika. Izi zimapangitsa Bitcoin kukhala ndalama zoyamba zotseguka ndi zopanda malire.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_3: Bitcoin ndi ndalama zadigitala zomwe zimakupatsani umwini wathunthu wa chuma chanu. Kwa nthawi yoyamba m'mbiri ya anthu, aliyense atha kukhala ndi chuma chomwe ndi chochepa kwenikweni, chosafuna chilolezo kugwiritsidwa ntchito, ndipo sichitha kulandidwa chikasungidwa bwino.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_4: Bitcoin imatha kutumizidwa kulikonse padziko lonse, mwachangu ndi mwatsika mtengo. Sikufuna wina aliyense kutumiza, monga banki.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_5: Bitcoin imalola aliyense kusunga chuma chawo motetezeka popanda kudera nkhawa kuti boma lingabe kapena kuchepetsa mtengo wake kusindikiza ndalama.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_6: Maboma kulikonse amatha kusindikiza ndalama zambiri, koma palibe amene angasindikize bitcoin zambiri.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_7: Mutha kusunga Bitcoin yanu nokha mosavuta kuti mukhale ndi ulamuliro wathunthu, zomwe zimakupatsani mphamvu yonse ya Bitcoin.
common_what_is_bitcoin_content_8: Ngati mutha kutitsa pulogalamu, mutha kusunga Bitcoin yanu nokha ndi kusunga chuma chanu popanda kudalira wina aliyense.
common_bitcoin_volatile: NDAMVA KUTI BITCOIN IMASINTHA KWAMBIRI. KODI NDI YOTETEZEKA?
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_1: Pa nthawi yochepa, mtengo wosinthiranira wa Bitcoin umasintha kwambiri. Izi zimatchedwa kusinthasintha.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_2: Koma kusinthasintha komwe mumaona tsiku ndi tsiku kumatha pa nthawi yaitali.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_3: Bitcoin ikupitiriza kukhala yosinthasintha pang'ono pamene nthawi ikupita. Anthu ambiri akagwiritsa ntchito Bitcoin ngati akaunti yosungira ndalama kwa nthawi yaitali, mtengo wake umakhazikika.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_4: Anthu ambiri amasankha kusunga chuma mu Bitcoin kwa zaka zambiri ngati njira yotetezeka yochepetsa chiwopsezo cha kusinthasintha ndi kuteteza mphamvu yawo yogulira nthawi zonse.
common_bitcoin_volatile_content_5: M'mayiko ena, monga Venezuela, Sudan, Lebanon, Syria, Argentina, Turkey, Brazil, ndi ambiri, mtengo wa ndalama zakomweko umakwera msanga kwambiri moti Bitcoin imaonedwa ngati njira yokhazikika yosungira ndalama.
common_bitcoin_afford_content_1: Dola imapangidwa ndi masenti 100. Bitcoin imapangidwa ndi sats 100,000,000 (100 miliyoni).
common_bitcoin_afford_content_2: Simukuyenera kukhala ndi bitcoin yathunthu. Anthu ambiri ali ndi sats okha. Sats ndi zigawo za bitcoin. Mwachitsanzo, ngati bitcoin 1 yathunthu ndi $100,000 ndiye $1 imakugulitsani sats 1,000!
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_1: Mwina mwamva za kuhackidwa kwa Bitcoin pa intaneti kapena pa nkhani. Anthu ambiri amawerenga nkhani izi ndi kukhulupirira kuti netiweki ya Bitcoin yahackidwa. Komabe, netiweki ya Bitcoin sinayambe yahackidwa.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_2: Kodi netiweki ya Bitcoin ndi chiyani? Ganizani za netiweki ya Bitcoin ngati njira za sitima yapamtunda. Sitima zomwe zikuyenda pa njira za sitima yapamtunda ya Bitcoin ndi machitidwe a Bitcoin.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_3: Mukawerenga za kuhackidwa kwa Bitcoin mu nkhani, mukuwerenga za wosunga (monga FTX) amene ahackidwa kapena agwa.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_4: Osunga ndi makampani omwe amasunga bitcoin yanu. Komabe, izi zimabweretsa chiwopsezo: kutayirira bitcoin yanu kampani ikayisamalira moyipa, kuba, kapena kutseka.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_6: Aliyense amene anakhulupirira FTX ndi bitcoin yawo anatayirira bitcoin yawo. Aliyense amene anasunga bitcoin yawo nokha sanakhudzidwe ndi FTX. Izi ndizo mphamvu ya bitcoin yosungidwa nokha: ulamuliro weniweni wa ndalama zanu.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_7: M'malo mosiya bitcoin yanu pa exchange kapena mu chikuto ngati ETF, isungeni mu chikwama chanu kuti mupeze ufulu wonse.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_8: Mukasunga bitcoin yanu nokha, ndalama zanu zimatetezedwa ndi netiweki ya Bitcoin. Ndi netiweki yotetezeka kwambiri ya ndalama padziko lonse.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_9: Pokusunga wekha, Sam wa FTX sangathe kukubani bitcoin yanu.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_10: Boma silitha kusindikiza bitcoin zambiri ndi kupangitsa kukwera kwa mitengo.
common_bitcoin_hacked_content_11: Bitcoin yosungidwa nokha ndi ndalama zanu, chifukwa cha mphamvu ya netiweki ya Bitcoin.
common_bitcoin_energy: CHIFUKWA CHIYANI BITCOIN IMAGWIRITSA NTCHITO MPHAMVU?
common_bitcoin_energy_content_1: Bitcoin imagwiritsa ntchito mphamvu kuteteza netiweki ndi kuteteza ndalama zanu.
common_bitcoin_energy_content_2: Bitcoin imagwiritsa ntchito mphamvu yochuluka, ndipo izi ndi zabwino pa zifukwa zambiri.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_1: Bitcoin ilibe kuthawa kwa anthu kumabanki.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_2: Bitcoin imathandiza kukhazikitsa maukonde a mphamvu ndi kufukula Bitcoin.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_3: Bitcoin imachepetsa kutulutsa kuchokera ku kufukula mafuta.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_4: Bitcoin imagwiritsa ntchito mphamvu yochepa kuposa yomwe Aamerika amagwiritsa ntchito pa magetsi a Khrisimasi chaka chilichonse.
common_bitcoin_energy_list_5: Bitcoin ndi bizinesi yobiriwira kwambiri padziko lapansi!
common_cic_intro_1: Anthu ambiri amadziwa za Chiwongo Chowonjezeka, koma anthu ochepa amadziwa za Kukwera kwa Mitengo Kowonjezeka.
common_cic_intro_2: Ndi Chipangizo chathu Chowerengera Kukwera kwa Mitengo Kowonjezeka, mutha kuwerengera mosavuta kuchuluka komwe malipiro anu akuyenera kukwera kuti musunga mphamvu yanu yogulira nthawi zonse.
common_cic_intro_3: Lembani malipiro anu apano, chiwerengero cha kukwera kwa mitengo, ndi zaka zomwe mukufuna kuwerengera, ndipo chipangizo chathu chidzakuonetsani malipiro anu ayenera kukhala otani kuti muyende ndi kukwera kwa mitengo.
common_result_starting_message: Dzadzani fomu yomwe ili pamwamba ndipo dinani werengera.
common_error_message: Cholakwika: Chonde dzadzani minda yonse itatu.
common_result_message_1: Ndi chiwerengero cha kukwera kwa mitengo cha
common_stickers_bulk_store: Odolani zitikiti zambiri kuchokera kwa wosindikiza womwe ife timagwiritsa ntchito.
common_stickers_bulk_cheaper: Zitikiti zochuluka mukagula, ndi zotsika mtengo pa chitikiti chilichonse.
common_stickers_print_instructions_1: Mutha kutengapo mbali posindikiza zitikiti zanu, kulikonse komwe muli! Dinani pa chilankhulo chanu pansipa kuti mutsitse mafayilo a zitikiti ndi malangizo.
common_stickers_print_instructions_2: Chonde dziwani: zitikiti sizipezeka m'zilankhulo zonse.
common_stickers_request_language_2: Dzadzani fomu yomwe ili pansipa kuti mupemphe mafayilo a zitikiti mu chilankhulo chanu.
common_stickers_material_vinyl: zitikiti za vinyl zogwiritsidwa ntchito panja
common_stickers_printer: Timagwiritsa ntchito StickerMule.com koma mutha kugwiritsa ntchito kampani iliyonse ya zitikiti.
common_stickers_dimensions_cure_v2: 6.35 cm x 12.7 cm (2.5 in x 5 in)
common_nostr_protocol_c1: Nostr ndi njira yatsopano yomwe imakuthandizani kulankhulana pa intaneti popanda mantha a kuletsa, kuchotsedwa, kapena kuchepetsedwa
common_nostr_protocol_c2: Mapulatifomu monga Twitter ndi Facebook amalamulira ndi kampani imodzi, koma palibe amene amalamulira njira ya Nostr.
common_nostr_freedom_c1: Nostr imafanana ndi imelo. Palibe amene amalamulira njira ya imelo, ndipo aliyense amatha kupanga pulogalamu (monga Gmail, Hotmail, ndi zina) pamwamba pake.
common_nostr_freedom_c2: Palibe amene amalamulira njira ya Nostr, ndipo aliyense amatha kupanga pulogalamu (monga Damus, Amethyst, ndi zina) pamwamba pake.
common_nostr_freedom_c3: Ngati simukukondwera ndi momwe pulogalamu ina imagwirire ntchito, mutha kusamutsa akaunti yanu ya Nostr ku pulogalamu ina popanda kutayirira otsatira anu kapena zomwe mwalemba.
common_nostr_bitcoin_c1: Bitcoin yapangidwa mkati mwa njira ya Nostr. Mukaona zomwe mukukonda, mutha kutumiza bitcoin kwa munthu ngati zikomo!
common_nostr_bitcoin_c2: Pa mapulatifomu okhazikika pamodzi monga Twitter ndi Facebook, kampaniyo imapeza ndalama kuchokera ku zomwe mumalemba. Koma pa njira zotseguka monga Nostr, ndinu mumapeza ndalama kuchokera ku zomwe mumalemba.
common_nostr_download_client: TSITSANI PULOGALAMU YAULERE KUTI MULOWE MU NOSTR
common_nostr_wallet_built_in: Chikwama cha Bitcoin cha zap chapangidwa mkati
common_nostr_test: Njira yosavuta yoyesera Nostr pogwiritsa ntchito akaunti yoyesera
common_kit_printer: Tikumalangiza VistaPrint.com kusindikiza mapepala anu a Bitcoin Business Kit. Komabe, mutha kugwiritsa ntchito kampani iliyonse yosindikiza bola ingakwanitse kusindikiza mbali zonse ziwiri.
common_kit_unfolded_size_bbk: Kukula kwa pepala (8.5 in x 11 in)
common_biz_learn: Phunzirani chifukwa Bitcoin ndi yabwino kwa bizinesi
common_biz_wallets: Pezani chikwama cha Bitcoin kuti mulandire malipiro a Bitcoin
common_biz_maps: Lembetsani pa mapu a amalonda a Bitcoin
common_biz_accounting: Gaidi ya Kulemba Ndalama ya Bitcoin
common_biz_kit: Sindikizani chipangizo chanu cha Bizinesi cha Bitcoin
common_biz_ready: MULI OKONZEKA KULANDIRA BITCOIN PA BIZINESI YANU?
common_sticker_files_mission_1: Cholinga chathu ndi kukuthandizani kubweretsa anthu ambiri ku Bitcoin poyika zitikiti za Bitcoin poyera. Zitikiti zathu zonse zili ndi ma QR code omwe amalumikizana ndi masamba ophunzitsa za
common_sticker_files_mission_4: Ngati muli ku USA kapena Canada, mutha
common_sticker_files_mission_5: kupempha paketi ya zitikiti za Chingerezi kwaulere
common_footer_tagline: Kufulumizitsa kugwiritsiridwa ntchito kwa bitcoin kudzera mu maphunziro.
